emails.subject: Re: Automated Power Exchange
emails.body: Re: Automated Power Exchange I'm checking with Chris Foster and Chris Mallory, who are apparently the ones initiating these trades. Both are out of the office right now, so it might be tomorrow before I can get back to you on this. But my guess is that if APX does not want to receive confirms on daily deals, then we don't need to send them. I'll let you know for sure as soon as I talk to the traders. Thanks, Kate From: Kimberly Allen on 03/29/2001 03:52 PM CST

emails.subject: Automated Power Exchange
emails.body: Automated Power Exchange Hey Kate! I received a phone call from a Jim Cross from Automated Power Exchange. Now that we are confirming daily's he mentioned that he did not want to receive dailys per the APX Master Agreement. He told me that all trades are anonimus under the APX agreement and we should not be confirming theses. Examples: #563948 and #563381. Some of the trader doing these trades are Chris Mallory and Les Rawson. Could you ask them is we should continue to confirm these daily's or not? Thanks Kimberly
